evals.prompt: chase this invoice for me pls
evals.expected_output: One ready-to-send email, ~71 days past due tone: states aging, asks for remittance if paid or firm date if not, 'Dear Accounts Payable team' greeting (no contact name on invoice), zero placeholders, no multi-section report.
assertions: Output contains no placeholders such as [Name], [Your Company], <date>, XX, or similar fill-in markers
Greeting is a real usable salutation (e.g. 'Hi team,' or 'Dear Accounts Payable team,'), since no contact name appears on the invoice
Email states the invoice is 60+ days past due (approximately 71 days) with a specific number or the due date
Email asks for remittance details if paid OR a firm payment date if unpaid (conditional ask, does not flatly assert nonpayment as verified fact)
Primary deliverable is a single email (subject + body), not a multi-section report with account assessment / internal note / review status
No invented late fees, legal threats, or collection consequences

evals.prompt: this is due next week - send a quick nudge so it gets paid on time
evals.expected_output: One ready-to-send pre-due email addressed to Dana Whitfield: confirms invoice INV-3090 ($8,150, due July 21) is approved and scheduled, service-oriented tone, no overdue language, no placeholders.
assertions: Email greets Dana by name (contact name is on the invoice)
Tone is pre-due/service-oriented: asks to confirm the invoice is approved/scheduled; contains no overdue, late, or dunning language
References invoice INV-3090 and the July 21 due date accurately
Primary deliverable is a single email, not a multi-section report

evals.prompt: they're holding payment over a PO mismatch, their email is attached with the invoice. draft a reply that gets this moving
evals.expected_output: One ready-to-send reply to Priya Raman resolving the PO-8812 vs PO-8821 discrepancy; does not demand payment of the disputed amount as though undisputed; proposes a concrete resolution step; no placeholders.
assertions: Email addresses Priya by name and acknowledges the PO discrepancy (PO-8812 vs PO-8821) specifically
Email is resolution-focused: offers or confirms a corrected invoice / PO fix rather than demanding immediate payment of the disputed amount
Email does not treat the invoice as an undisputed overdue balance despite being 15 days past due
Primary deliverable is a single email, not a multi-section report
